reviews.review_description: I can't seem to clear hospital 5.  I have 4 to clear to get to next level.  the gun I have can't kill the big zombies.

Please fix Z3: Hospital 13. It's IMPOSSIBLE to beat this level. Got all weapons maxed out, tried +20 times landing headshots only, both with P90 and shotgun but the big guy has too much health and reload time is too long so he would eventually spit and kill me.
Would love to change to 5 stars since the game is very fun.

I'm stuck in the second level where I only have 2 gun choices and not enough time to reload. I've found it's better to use my game controller, which actually just uses the Gear VR headset but you can shoot better, but uses more ammo. I've heard that if you're using the Gear VR controller it loads faster if you point it down, but have not felt that to be true. Come on with the teeny-tiny balls you have to shoot through all the zombies! My middle-aged eyes can barely pick them up through the crown until they're right under you! I want this to be challenging but not frustrating! PLEASE make it load faster!!!

I have a theory. I think this game is incomplete. Thats why you cant pass zone 3, hospital 13. The people that made this game, never finished it. So instead they just made a impossible to pass level to get away with releasing and selling half a game. Them not replying to any comments, offering up any kind of strategy, no walk throughs, no proof of this game being a whole game. The developers are crooks and need to be investigated.

Need an update.in zone 5 alley 6 and subway 7 too hard.impossible to complete with AK-47.pls update more guns.giant dog,tiny man,crawling woman on the ceiling killing me everytime.just playing now horbour and lab only.can't get flame thrower weapon.fix pls
